questions.question: Which state is associated with the ‘Mukhyamantri Gramin Awas NYAY Yojana’?
questions.explanation: The Chhattisgarh government has revealed plans to provide homes to over 47,000 impoverished individuals in rural areas as part of the initial stage of the Mukhyamantri Gramin Awas NYAY Yojana. This initiative follows the failure to implement the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana in 2021 as Chhattisgarh government could not contribute its required share of funds.

questions.question: Which Indian state is experiencing a surge in Scrub Typhus?
questions.explanation: Due to record-breaking rainfall in Himachal Pradesh, the state is witnessing a surge in ‘chiggers’, a vector for Orientia tsutsugamushi, the pathogen responsible for causing scrub typhus. The state has recorded over 1,000 cases of the disease in 2023, twice the number recorded last year. Fifteen people have died due to scrub typhus in the state so far.

questions.question: ‘Swavlamban 2.0’ is the indigenisation roadmap of which institution?
questions.explanation: The Indian Navy will release its updated indigenisation roadmap, named ‘Swavlamban 2.0’, next week. It will provide an update on what has been achieved so far and the way ahead, as per the Vice Admiral Sanjay Singh, the Vice Chief of Naval Staff.

questions.question: Toto, a Sino-Tibetan language spoken by tribal Toto people, is written in which script?
questions.explanation: ‘Toto Shabda Sangraha’ Dictionary is set to be released to save Toto, a Sino-Tibetan language spoken by the tribal Toto people, from extinction. A language spoken by barely 1,600 people living in parts of West Bengal bordering Bhutan, is written in the Bengali script. Though Dhaniram Toto developed a script as recently as in 2015, most people either write it in Bengali script or write in Bengali language.

questions.question: Warehousing Development Regulatory Authority (WDRA) has entered into a MoU with which bank for Loans Against e-NWRs?
questions.explanation: The Warehousing Development Regulatory Authority (WDRA) has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Bank of India to support farmers and traders by providing low-interest rate loans against electronic negotiable warehouse receipts (e-NWRs). The objective of this partnership is to raise awareness and facilitate funding against e-NWRs.

questions.question: Which spacecraft successfully escaped the sphere of earth’s influence, after Mars Orbiter Mission?
questions.explanation: Aditya-L1 spacecraft has travelled beyond a distance of 9.2 lakh km from Earth, successfully escaping the sphere of earth’s influence, after the Mars Orbiter Mission. The spacecraft will remain in a halo orbit around L1, about 1.5 million km from Earth, to observe the Sun’s corona and other aspects without interruptions.

questions.question: Who has been nominated as the Ambassador for ‘War Against Waste’ in Jammu & Kashmir?
questions.explanation: Directorate of Rural Sanitation, Jammu and Kashmir, has announced the nomination of country’s highest gallantry awardee, the Param Vir Chakra recipient, Captain Bana Singh as Ambassador for ‘War Against Waste’ in Jammu & Kashmir. Theme of the Swachhata Hi Seva (SHS 2023) campaign is ‘Garbage Free India’ with focus on visual cleanliness and welfare of SafaiMitras.

questions.question: Who is the first Indian Table Tennis singles player to reach quarterfinals of the Asian Games?
questions.explanation: Indian table tennis star Manika Batra has become the first-ever Indian singles player to reach the quarterfinals of the Asian Games in table tennis. Veteran Table Tennis players Sharath Kamal and G Sathiyan crashed out in the pre-quarter finals.

questions.question: Project Kuiper to provide fast, affordable broadband internet service belongs to which company?
questions.explanation: Project Kuiper is a subsidiary of Amazon that was established in 2019. The goal is to provide fast, affordable broadband to underserved communities. Amazon recently broke ground on a $120 million pre-launch processing facility in Florida. It also launched the first pair of test satellites for its planned internet service.

questions.question: Which Indian armed force is implementing ‘360-degree appraisal mechanism’ for promotion?
questions.explanation: The Indian Navy is implementing a new 360-degree appraisal mechanism for officers being considered for promotion. The mechanism will include peer reviews from colleagues and subordinates to evaluate an officer’s impact on their team. The feedback obtained will be analyzed by a nominated board of officers.
